etymology.interpretation: The character 果 (guǒ) vividly depicts fruits hanging from a tree, encapsulating the concrete image of a tree bearing fruit, which directly leads to the meaning of 'fruit.' The tree and the fruit form an intuitive visual association with the concept of bearing or producing fruits.

examples.chinese: 我喜欢吃苹果(我喜歡吃蘋果)。
这个果汁很新鲜(這個果汁很新鮮)。
水果摊上有很多种类的水果(水果攤上有很多種類的水果)。
examples.pinyin: Shuǐguǒ tān shàng yǒu hěnduō zhǒnglèi de shuǐguǒ.
examples.english: There are many varieties of fruit at the fruit stand.
